description: Create a Python CI workflow that runs on every push and on pull requests to the master branch. Use a matrix strategy to test on multiple Python versions (3.7-3.11, pypy-3.9) and operating systems (ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest), excluding some combinations. For each job, check out the code, set up Python, install dependencies with pip and poetry, run tests with py.test, perform type checks with pytest-mypy, and optionally verify and upload coverage results.
